home.subtitle: Your Personal Medicine Reminder
home.fullDescription: SalusLogica is your intelligent medicine reminder system that helps you stay on track with your medications, manage your health, and improve adherence to your treatment plans.

features.title: Everything You Need to Manage Your Health
features.subtitle: Comprehensive features designed to make medication management simple and effective

medicineManagement.title: Medicine Management
medicineManagement.description: Add, edit, and organize all your medications in one place with detailed dosage instructions and schedules.

smartReminders.title: Smart Reminders
smartReminders.description: Get timely notifications for your medications through SMS, email, or push notifications.

doseTracking.title: Dose Tracking
doseTracking.description: Track your medication adherence with detailed history and compliance statistics.

patientProfiles.title: Patient Profiles
patientProfiles.description: Create comprehensive patient profiles with medical history, allergies, and personalized care plans.

pharmacyManagement.title: Pharmacy Management
pharmacyManagement.description: Pharmacy administrators can manage multiple patients and monitor their medication adherence.

mobileCompatible.title: Mobile Compatible
mobileCompatible.description: Access your medication schedule and receive reminders on any device with our responsive design.

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.description: Track your medication adherence and health insights

cta.title: Ready to Take Control of Your Health?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of users who trust SalusLogica for their medication management.

login.title: Login
login.errorWithSubmission: There was an error with your submission

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.agreeTerms: I agree to the terms and conditions
signup.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
signup.pharmacyAdminPlaceholder: Enter pharmacy admin ID (optional - leave blank to signup without admin)

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and preferences
profile.deleteAccountWarning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. All your data will be permanently deleted.
profile.deleteAccountPermanent: This action is permanent and irreversible. All the following data will be permanently deleted:
profile.accountDeleted: Your account has been permanently deleted.
profile.deleteAccountFailed: Failed to delete account. Please check your password.
profile.confirmLogout: Are you sure you want to logout?
profile.enterPasswordToConfirm: Please enter your password to confirm.
profile.deleteAccountConfirmMessage: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be deleted.
profile.exactAgeHelper: Exact age is used for medication safety checks

medicines.subtitle: Manage your medication schedule and track adherence
medicines.demoData: You are viewing demo data. Log in to see your actual medicines.
medicines.name: Name

addMedicine.subtitle: Enter the details for your medicine reminder
addMedicine.timesRequired: At least one time is required
addMedicine.selectExactTimes: Select exact times when you need to take this medicine
addMedicine.error: Failed to add medicine. Please try again.
addMedicine.instructionsPlaceholder: e.g., Take with food, avoid grapefruit
addMedicine.consultDoctor: Please consult with your doctor immediately.

interactionChecker.title: Interaction Checker
interactionChecker.selectAtLeast2: Please select at least 2 medications to check interactions
interactionChecker.checkSafety: Check for drug interactions, allergy alerts, and contraindications to ensure medication safety
interactionChecker.chooseToCheck: Choose medications to check for interactions

auth.signupSuccess: Signup successful! You can now log in.
auth.failedToCreateAccount: Failed to create account. Please try again.
auth.pharmacyAdminIdSuccess: Success! Your Pharmacy Admin ID is: %(pharmacy_id)s

pharmacyAdmin.title: Pharmacy Information
pharmacyAdmin.adminIdOptional: Optional: Get this ID from your pharmacy administrator if you want to be managed by a pharmacy.

roleDescriptions.patient: Create an account to manage your personal medications and health records
roleDescriptions.pharmacyAdmin: Manage multiple patients and their medication adherence

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.patientSubtitle: Comprehensive insights and performance metrics for your health
analytics.pharmacyAdminSubtitle: Comprehensive insights and performance metrics for your pharmacy
analytics.adminSubtitle: Comprehensive insights and performance metrics for the entire system
analytics.bestPerformingDetail: Highest adherence rate among your medications
analytics.positiveTrendDetail: Your adherence has been improving over time
analytics.optimizeTimingDetail: Adjust your medication schedule for better adherence
analytics.scheduleReviewDetail: Schedule a review with your healthcare provider
analytics.enhancedRemindersDetail: Set up additional reminders for missed doses

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
forgotPassword.emailSentMessage: If an account with that email exists, we've sent a password reset link.
forgotPassword.linkExpiry: The link will expire in 1 hour. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
forgotPassword.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.failedToReset: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated. You can now log in with your new password.

verifyEmail.requestNewLink: You can request a new verification email from the login page.

emailVerification.verificationSentTo: We've sent a verification link to:
emailVerification.clickLinkToVerify: Please click the link in your email to verify your account. You won't be able to log in until your email is verified.
emailVerification.resentSuccess: Verification email resent! Check your inbox.
emailVerification.resentFailedShort: Failed to resend. Try again later.
emailVerification.notVerifiedMessage: Your email is not verified. Check your inbox or resend the verification email.
emailVerification.verificationSent: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.
emailVerification.linkExpiry24h: The link will expire in 24 hours. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
emailVerification.enterEmailFirst: Please enter your email address first.
emailVerification.selectRoleDescription: Select your role to see description

pharmacyAdminDashboard.title: Pharmacy Admin Dashboard
pharmacyAdminDashboard.viewPatientsDesc: See all patients registered with you

pharmacyAdminPatients.title: My Patients
pharmacyAdminPatients.subtitle: Manage and monitor all patients registered with your pharmacy
pharmacyAdminPatients.noMatchSearch: No patients match your search criteria
pharmacyAdminPatients.noRegistered: No patients registered with your pharmacy yet

pharmacyAdminAdverseReactions.title: Adverse Reactions
pharmacyAdminAdverseReactions.subtitle: Monitor adverse reactions reported by your patients
pharmacyAdminAdverseReactions.noMatchFilters: No adverse reactions match your filters

exportReports.title: Export Reports
exportReports.subtitle: Generate and download PDF reports for your medications, dose history, and adherence statistics.
exportReports.medicineListDesc: Complete list of all your medications with dosage, frequency, and current status.
exportReports.doseHistoryDesc: Detailed log of all scheduled doses and whether they were taken, missed, or snoozed.
exportReports.adherenceReportDesc: Adherence rates per medicine with daily breakdown and visual progress indicators.
exportReports.fullReportDesc: Comprehensive report combining medications, dose history, and adherence analysis — ideal for doctor visits.
exportReports.downloadError: Failed to generate report. Please try again.
exportReports.infoDescription: These reports are generated in real-time from your medication data. They are formatted as professional PDF documents that you can share with your healthcare provider during appointments. Reports include your medication list, dose history, and adherence statistics.

sideEffects.title: Side Effect Tracker
sideEffects.subtitle: Log and track side effects from your medications. Your reports are shared with your pharmacy admin.
sideEffects.treatmentPlaceholder: What did you do to manage the symptoms?
sideEffects.noEffectsDesc: You haven't reported any side effects yet. Use the button above to log one.
sideEffects.logError: Failed to log side effect. Please try again.

notifications.title: Notification Center
notifications.subtitle: Stay updated with your medication reminders and alerts
notifications.pushEnabledDesc: You will receive push notifications on this device
notifications.pushDisabledDesc: Enable push to receive real-time medication reminders
notifications.pushNotSupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser
notifications.noNotificationsDesc: You're all caught up! New reminders will appear here.
notifications.infoDescription: When enabled, you will receive real-time push notifications for dose reminders, missed doses, and medication alerts — even when the app is not open.

scanner.noCameras: No cameras found on this device
scanner.tip: Hold the barcode steady inside the frame
scanner.notFound: No medicine found for this barcode
scanner.lookupError: Failed to look up barcode. Please try again.
